name: driftwood-custodian
description: Merged manifest: Dynatrace MCP server (1.8.6) + driftwood-agent (ADK, Gemini-3.5-flash)

tools.name: get_environment_info
tools.description: Get information about the connected Dynatrace environment

tools.name: list_vulnerabilities
tools.description: List security vulnerabilities detected by Dynatrace

tools.name: list_problems
tools.description: List problems detected by Davis AI

tools.name: find_entity_by_name
tools.description: Find a monitored entity (service, host, process group) by name

tools.name: send_slack_message
tools.description: Send a Slack message via a Dynatrace AppEngine Slack connection
capabilities: assert:dynatrace.slack_recipients_unbounded:"message destination is chosen by tool arguments, not by the sandbox; egress is tenant-mediated and cannot be constrained at the OS level"

tools.name: verify_dql
tools.description: Verify a DQL statement without executing it

tools.name: execute_dql
tools.description: Execute a DQL query against Grail
capabilities: assert:dynatrace.grail_budget:"per-session Grail scan volume is capped by DT_GRAIL_QUERY_BUDGET_GB inside the server, not by the sandbox"

tools.name: generate_dql_from_natural_language
tools.description: Generate a DQL statement from natural language via Davis CoPilot

tools.name: explain_dql_in_natural_language
tools.description: Explain a DQL statement in natural language via Davis CoPilot

tools.name: chat_with_davis_copilot
tools.description: Ask Davis CoPilot a question about the environment

tools.name: create_workflow_for_notification
tools.description: Create an AutomationEngine workflow that sends a notification
capabilities: assert:dynatrace.workflow_persists:"creates a persistent workflow in the tenant that runs after the sandbox exits"

tools.name: make_workflow_public
tools.description: Change a workflow's visibility to public

tools.name: get_kubernetes_events
tools.description: Fetch Kubernetes cluster events from Grail

tools.name: reset_grail_budget
tools.description: Reset the session Grail query budget counter
capabilities: assert:dynatrace.budget_self_reset:"the budget guarding execute_dql can be reset by the same principal it constrains"

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Send an email via the Dynatrace Email API
capabilities: assert:dynatrace.email_recipients_unbounded:"recipient list is chosen by tool arguments; this is data egress inside the allowed tenant endpoint and is invisible to the OS-level sandbox"

tools.name: send_event
tools.description: Send an event (e.g. deployment marker) to the tenant

tools.name: list_exceptions
tools.description: List exception groups from monitored services

tools.name: list_davis_analyzers
tools.description: List available Davis analyzers

tools.name: execute_davis_analyzer
tools.description: Execute a Davis analyzer (e.g. forecast, anomaly detection)

tools.name: create_dynatrace_notebook
tools.description: Create a notebook document in the tenant
